pillars.name: AI-Powered Protection
pillars.purpose: Demonstrate technological superiority. Show — don't tell — what 383 AI agents do for property owners.
pillars.audienceConnection: Directly addresses the #1 fear of every absentee homeowner: 'What is happening to my property right now?' Positions Coastal Key as the only company that can answer that question in real-time.

pillars.name: Treasure Coast Lifestyle
pillars.purpose: Build emotional connection. Make Coastal Key synonymous with the Treasure Coast itself.
pillars.audienceConnection: Seasonal residents and snowbirds don't just own property here — they love this place. Content that celebrates the Treasure Coast creates an emotional bond that makes Coastal Key feel like a neighbor, not a vendor.

pillars.name: CEO Journey & Culture
pillars.purpose: Humanize the brand. Build trust through transparency, vision, and authenticity.
pillars.audienceConnection: People hire people, not companies. The CEO's story — building a 383-agent AI fleet from scratch to protect properties — is inherently compelling. Every founder milestone, hard lesson, and behind-the-scenes moment builds the kind of trust that a logo never can.

pillars.name: Property Owner Education
pillars.purpose: Establish expertise. Become the definitive resource for property protection knowledge.
pillars.audienceConnection: Educated buyers convert faster and stay longer. When a property owner learns something valuable from Coastal Key, they associate CK with expertise. This pillar positions Coastal Key as the authority before any sales conversation happens.

pillars.name: Results & Social Proof
pillars.purpose: Close the trust gap. Prove with evidence that Coastal Key delivers.
pillars.audienceConnection: The final conversion trigger. When a prospect has seen the technology, felt the lifestyle connection, trusted the CEO, and learned from the education — real results from real clients eliminate the last barrier to buying.
